# ISwrStore.TryGet method

Attempts to retrieve a cache entry by key. Returns true if found.

```csharp
public bool TryGet(string key, out CacheEntry? entry)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| key | The cache key to look up. |
| entry | The cache entry if found, or null if not present. |

## Return Value

True if a cache entry exists for the given key; otherwise false.
